risk_keywords.security deposit: Security deposit clause -- check the amount and conditions for return.
risk_keywords.sublet: Subletting/assignment restriction -- check whether subletting is allowed.
risk_keywords.subletting: Subletting/assignment restriction -- check whether subletting is allowed.
risk_keywords.maintenance: Maintenance responsibility clause -- check who is responsible for repairs.
risk_keywords.late fee: Late fee clause -- check the amount and any grace period.
risk_keywords.early termination: Early termination clause -- check penalties for breaking the lease early.
risk_keywords.automatically renew: Renewal/holdover clause -- check automatic renewal terms.
risk_keywords.holdover: Holdover clause -- check what happens if tenant stays past the lease term.
risk_keywords.pet: Pet policy -- check restrictions and fees.
risk_keywords.eviction: Eviction clause -- check grounds and notice requirements.

expected_clauses.description: security deposit amount and return conditions

risk_keywords.confidential information: Definition of confidential information -- check how broadly or narrowly it's scoped.
risk_keywords.return or destroy: Return/destruction of materials clause -- check what happens to confidential materials after the relationship ends.
risk_keywords.residual: Residuals clause -- may allow broader future use of retained knowledge than expected.
risk_keywords.exclusions: Exclusions from confidential information -- check standard carve-outs are present (publicly known, independently developed, etc.).
risk_keywords.injunctive relief: Injunctive relief clause -- allows a court order without needing to prove monetary damages.
risk_keywords.term of this agreement: Duration of confidentiality obligation -- check how long the obligation lasts.
risk_keywords.governing law: Governing law clause -- specifies which state's law applies to disputes.

expected_clauses.description: return or destruction of materials upon termination
